  "claims": [
    "SB 1298 will continuously appropriate at least $1 billion annually to help counties build out essential mental health bed capacity.",
    "Issues resulting from the lack of investment in mental health have been on the rise across communities.",
    "California has an inpatient psychiatric bed capacity of 21 beds per 100,000 people, whereas the estimated need is 50 beds per 100,000 people.",
    "In 2017, California had among the lowest inpatient psychiatric bed capacity in the country.",
    "Almost half of the counties in California had no adult acute psychiatric beds as of 2015.",

    "The number of Substance Use Disorder treatment facilities in California has decreased by 13 percent over the last three years."
